name: hubspot-deploy-integration
description: Deploy HubSpot integrations to Vercel, Fly.io, and Cloud Run platforms. Use when deploying HubSpot-powered applications, configuring platform secrets, or setting up deployment pipelines with HubSpot access tokens. Trigger with phrases like "deploy hubspot", "hubspot Vercel", "hubspot Cloud Run", "hubspot Fly.io", "hubspot production deploy".
